Sport|Football

OlympiacosvsFiorentinaLIVE!

Olympiakos beat Fiorentina 1-0 after extra time in the Europa Conference League final on Wednesday to win the club's first major European trophy, thanks to a late winner from Ayoub El Kaabi.

In a match that was high on intensity and physicality but low on quality in front of goal, neither side could find the net in the regulation 90 minutes before El Kaabi netted the winner in the 116th minute.

With the game seemingly headed to a penalty shootout, El Kaabi got in front of his marker to bundle in Santiago Hezze's cross but the players and fans had a long, nervous wait for VAR to check for offside before the goal was awarded.

The result marked a second consecutive defeat in the Europa Conference League final for Fiorentina, who had reached this season's summit clash without losing a single game.

Olympiacos vs Fiorentina latest updates

Live updates

You canread our match report here.

Jovetic is interviewed and makes a point to mention former club Fiorentina, wishes them well. It’s a nice touch.

The engraver is hard at work. Quite a few letters to get through.

This is such a great competition, allowing teams like Olympiacos to have nights like this.

West Ham last year, too.

Incredible scenes in Athens.

126min:That’s it! Olympiacos have won the Europa Conference League!

History is made as the Fiorentina players collapse to the pitch.

124min:A little over 90 seconds to go. Spare a thought for Fiorentina, who look set for more Europa Conference League final heartbreak.

123min:El Kaabi has come off and the party is beginning early in Athens.

121min:El Kaabi gets booked for his celebration but he doesn’t care. He has the biggest grin on his face.

120min:It counts! Olympiacos are on the brink of a first European trophy!

author: Alex Young
description: The Greek giants made history in Athens by winning a first major European trophy
